Rong Ge ś¶ģťāį
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Rong Ge (ś¶ģťāį)was born in Jingzhao. Held hostage by Guo Si. Rong Ge was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom.
